zh.Heleigh Castle, Audley, Staffordshire, E: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabella Stoneley於1050年5月9日出生在英國斯塔福爾巴爾特利時，她的父親Henry De Stanley25歲，母親Mrs Henry De Stanley20歲。她於1081年與Adam de Alditheley II在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1130年9月9日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabella Stoneley于1050年5月9日出生在英国斯塔福爾巴爾特利时，她的父亲Henry De Stanley25岁，母亲Mrs Henry De Stanley20岁。她于1081年与Adam de Alditheley II在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1130年9月9日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stoneley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwicks), or Stonely (Hunts).  Compare  Stanley  .

variants.name: Stanley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

nameMeanings.name: Mabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name, apparently derived from   Isabella   by the dropping of the initial vowel.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabella Stoneley was born on 9 May 1050, in Balterley, Staffordshire, England, her father, Henry De Stanley, was 25 and her mother, Mrs Henry De Stanley, was 20. She married Adam de Alditheley II in 1081, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 9 September 1130, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabella Stoneley est née le 9 mai 1050, à Balterley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Stanley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Henry De Stanley, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Alditheley II en 1081, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 septembre 1130, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabella Stoneley am 9. Mai 1050 in Balterley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Stanley 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs Henry De Stanley 20. Sie hat 1081 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Adam de Alditheley II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. September 1130 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabella Stoneley è nata il il 9 maggio 1050 nel Balterley, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Henry De Stanley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Mrs Henry De Stanley, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Adam de Alditheley II nel 1081, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 9 settembre 1130, nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabella Stoneleyが1050年5月9日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアボーテルリーで生まれた時，父Henry De Stanleyは25歳，母Mrs Henry De Stanleyは20歳であった。1081年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAdam de Alditheley IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1130年9月9日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabella Stoneley(이)가 1050년 5월 9일 영국 스태퍼드실르 바털리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Stanley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Henry De Stanley(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1081년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Adam de Alditheley II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 May 1050–9 September 1130: 9 de maio de 1050–9 de setembro de 1130
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabella Stoneley nasceu em 9 de maio de 1050, em Balterley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Stanley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Henry De Stanley, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam de Alditheley II em 1081, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1130, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabella Stoneley родилась 9 мая 1050 г. в местности балтирли, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry De Stanley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Henry De Stanley, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Alditheley II в 1081 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 9 сентября 1130 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.9 May 1050–9 September 1130: 9 de mayo de 1050–9 de septiembre de 1130

Se casó con Adam de Alditheley II en 1081, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1130, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
